LAA beat DET 10-6 on 5/26 with identical stress-flag stack (F1* asterisk + acute_roster + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade) to today's DET pick; consecutive-day series failure under same flag profile warrants DOWNGRADE of the residual B- stake.
